allow: Bash(git commit -m 'feat: scaffold app with state management and reducer *)

Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add FilterBar with All/Pending/Completed/Late filters and live counts *)

Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add TaskItem with inline edit, touch swipe-to-delete, tap-to-complete *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add TaskList with HTML5 drag-and-drop reordering, filter-aware *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: add ActionLog with collapsible panel and all required data-testids *)
